summary: Ralph Iteration 2: Code organization and quality improvements. Fixed 5 TypeScript errors in seed-data.ts (shadeAvailability, pollenLevels, mealIncluded properties). Extracted utility functions (calculateDistance, formatDistance, isLocationOpen, getLocationFamilyScore) into separate utils/locationUtils.ts. Extracted map configuration (CITIES, DAY_NAMES_ZH, marker styles, icon initialization) into separate config/mapConfig.ts. Updated App.tsx imports to use extracted code, reducing coupling and improving maintainability. Verified all 106 tests pass (48 client + 58 server_node).
improvements: Fixed 5 TypeScript errors in server_node/src/data/seed-data.ts for type safety
Extracted utility functions into dedicated utils/locationUtils.ts for reusability
Extracted map configuration into dedicated config/mapConfig.ts for maintainability
Improved code organization by separating concerns (utils, config, components)
Reduced App.tsx coupling to external configuration and utility functions
Improved code discoverability through module organization
git_commits: 8f7a92c: refactor: improve code organization and fix TypeScript errors
next_action: Continue with UI component refactoring. Extract LocationDetailPanel and MapPanel components to further reduce App.tsx size and improve maintainability. All P0/P1 features complete and working.
